commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=26cd45f708942f670293ee755048fb3b875fb748)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a structured core doctor session-lock health check and dry-run repair effect, wires it into ordered doctor health contribution checks, updates doctor docs, and adjusts doctor lint/contribution/session-lock tests.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +319, Docs +2. Total +342 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `core/doctor/session-locks` is now registered while the lint test still expects that same id to be unknown. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review and test execution may write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the PR is draft with a protected maintainer label, missing contributor real behavior proof, and compatibility/session-state choices; the remaining test mismatch is mechanical but not sufficient for automation to land it.

target.title: Doctor: expose session lock findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes stale session lock files as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for stale lock cleanup.
- Keeps the existing `doctor:session-locks` legacy `run` as the only real mutating cleanup path for normal `doctor` / `doctor --fix`.
- Wires `core/doctor/session-locks` into the ordered contribution list so lint order stays aligned with doctor order.

This is intentionally the small session-lock slice from the older doctor repair stack. It does not migrate session transcripts, snapshots, state providers, heartbeat repair, or state-integrity repair.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new session-lock commit in this PR is `26cd45f708`; the session-lock delta is 5 files.

## Validation

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-session-locks.ts src/commands/doctor-session-locks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-session-locks.ts src/commands/doctor-session-locks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts`
- `CI=1 TERM=dumb node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/commands/doctor-session-locks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (3 files, 40 tests)
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --commit HEAD` (clean; no actionable regressions)
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
